# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for complete application stack

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC

  SubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs 'us-east-1' ]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MySubnetA

  SubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 1, !GetAZs 'us-east-1' ]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MySubnetB

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties: {}
    
  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetA
      KeyName: my-key-pair
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyEC2Instance

  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      Engine: mysql
      MasterUsername: admin
      MasterUserPassword: Password123!
      DBName: MyDatabase
      AllocatedStorage: '20'
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      MultiAZ: false

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable MySQL access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: '3306'
          ToPort: '3306'
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: my-application-bucket

  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancing::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZones:
        - !Select [ 0, !GetAZs 'us-east-1' ]
        - !Select [ 1, !GetAZs 'us-east-1' ]
      Listeners:
        - LoadBalancerPort: '80'
          InstancePort: '80'
          Protocol: HTTP
      HealthCheck:
        Target: HTTP:80/
        HealthyThreshold: '2'
        UnhealthyThreshold: '2'
        Interval: '30'
        Timeout: '5'
      Subnets:
        - !Ref SubnetA
        - !Ref SubnetB

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC Id
    Value: !Ref VPC

  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance Id
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance

  RDSInstanceEndpoint:
    Description: RDS Instance Endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address

  S3BucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket Name
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket

  LoadBalancerDNS:
    Description: Load Balancer DNS Name
    Value: !GetAtt LoadBalancer.DNSName
